# Getting Started {.unnumbered}

This part introduces the `{admiral}` package and the foundational concepts you
need to understand before working through the ADaM dataset chapters.

-   [Introduction](introduction.qmd) — an overview of `{admiral}` and its main
    function types, with worked examples.
-   [Programming Concepts and Conventions](concepts_conventions.qmd) — covers
    the conventions shared across the entire `{admiral}` family of packages,
    including how `{admiral}` handles missing values, expressions, and
    R/SAS differences.
